channel.title: Download free software, update daily!

item.title: Download Thorium Reader 3.4.0
item.description: Thorium Reader is open source ebook reading software designed to deliver a seamless and feature-rich reading experience. It supports various e-book formats, including EPUB, PDF, and CBZ, allowing users to read their favorite books, magazines, and comics from a single app. Thorium Reader is a user-friendly, versatile ebook reader software designed to meet the needs of bookworms and digital readers. With a customizable interface, extensive format compatibility, accessibility features, and...

item.title: Download Digital Goldfish Screensaver 2.2.0
item.description: Digital Goldfish Screensaver brings the beauty of aquatic life into your digital space. It features spectacular animations of goldfish, carefully designed to provide a relaxing and vibrant experience. Powered by artificial intelligence (AI), users can customize the screen saver by adding or removing fish from the scene, and even resize them larger or smaller. This unique feature allows for an interactive experience, where you can choose from an impressive collection of 25 types of...

item.title: Download VMware InstallBuilder Enterprise 26.4
item.description: VMware InstallBuilder Enterprise is a development tool for building cross-platform installers for desktop and server software. With InstallBuilder, you can quickly create professional, dynamic installers for Linux, Windows, Mac OS X, Solaris, and other platforms from a project file and build environment. In addition to the installer, InstallBuilder will create RPM and Debian packages and rich CD / DVD. The automatic update function makes it easy to deliver updates directly to users...

item.title: Download Avast Ransomware Decryption Tools 1.0.0.826
item.description: Avast Ransomware Decryption Tools is a package of ransomware decryption tools to help you get back files from 20 different ransomware encrypted. Avast Ransomware Decryption Tools supports decryption AES_NI, Alcatraz Locker, Apocalypse, BadBlock, Bart, BTCWare, Crypt888, CryptoMix (Offline), CrySiS, EncrypTile, FindZip, Globe HiddenTear, Jigsaw, Legion NoobCrypt, Stampado, SZFLocker, TeslaCrypt, XData. PVS-Studio implements a series of check code, it is also useful to search the prints wrong error and Copy-Paste. Examples of such errors: V501, V517, V522, V523, V3001. The main value of static analysis is in regular use, hence the error is identified and corrected at the earliest stages. There's no point of wasting 50 hours to search for a fault can be found with static...

item.title: Download Opera One 130.0.5847.12

The Opera browser supports web browsing, listening to music, watching high speed movies, you can open many tabs on the Opera without affecting your browsing speed. Opera now supports almost all devices and operating systems such as windows, IOS, Android, linux, MacOS ... item.title: Download Horodruin 2026.4.839.0
item.description: Horodruin is a tool to synchronize the contents of multiple folders at once. Provide access rights and other details. Unlike similar products, Horodruin does not use specified destination folders, but synchronizes folders with each other, and you can restrict copying actions when using masks or permissions . Horodruin - Synchronize multiple folders It must be said that Horodruin is quite difficult for those who are just starting to get used to this software. But in return, Horodruin...

item.title: Download TurboSFV 11.0.1
item.description: TurboSFV is a utility for calculating and validating checksums for files. With TurboSFV you can calculate checksums (hash values) for your files. You can then validate the hashes to ensure that the contents of the files have not been changed. Before sending a file over the network, a hash value can be calculated, which can be used to detect data changes during transmission. Detects changed and missing files and finds new files added to the directory after creating the checksum file....

item.title: Download AssistMyTeam PDF Studio 7.2.303.0
item.description: The AssistMyTeam PDF Studio add-on integrates your Windows Explorer with a PDF reader, converter, editor, organizer, splitter, merger, file extractor and even OCR in an instant one-click operation. What sets this application apart from most other bloated, complex commercial PDF applications is its relative ease of use and efficiency with a simple, minimalistic yet intuitive and unobtrusive interface—just right-click on a file in Windows Explorer and perform the action you want to your...

item.title: Download AllMapSoft Offline Map Maker 8.383
item.description: AllMapSoft Offline Map Maker is software create, organize, offline map from Google Maps, Yahoo maps, Bing maps and Openstreetmap. You can view offline maps downloaded with map viewer offline. And you can zoom out or zoom in the offline map or export map under the file format .BMP with file world xxx.bpw, and can output files xxx.map for OziExplorer.
